div.class: d-flex justify-content-between align-items-start gap-3 flex-wrap mb-3

div.p: Blocking issues stop publication. Warnings can be forced only by a federation manager.

div.class: d-flex justify-content-between align-items-start gap-3 flex-wrap mb-3

div.p: Recently active planners are shown here so operators can coordinate before making overlapping changes.

t.t-esc: props.emptyMessage || 'No other planners have checked in recently.'

div.class: d-flex justify-content-between align-items-start gap-3 flex-wrap mb-3

div.p: Draft revisions can diverge from the live schedule until a manager republishes them.

div.div: No schedule revisions have been recorded for this gameday yet.

div.class: d-flex justify-content-between align-items-start gap-3 flex-wrap mb-3
d-flex justify-content-between align-items-start gap-3 flex-wrap mb-3

div.p: Rest, court, and start-time balance update as assignments move.

StatusBadge.t-props: { label: component.label + ' ' + component.score, tone: component.score >= 80 ? 'success' : component.score >= 60 ? 'warning' : 'danger' }

div.class: d-flex justify-content-between align-items-start gap-3 flex-wrap mb-3

div.p: Select one unscheduled match to see the best open slots ranked by current planner rules.

div.class: d-flex justify-content-between align-items-start gap-3 flex-wrap mb-2

div.div: Select exactly one unscheduled match to surface ranked open-slot suggestions.

div.p: Drag cards into a slot, or tap Assign on mobile.

DraggableMatchCard.t-props: { match: match, draggable: !props.isMobile, assigned: false, highlighted: (props.highlightedMatchIds || []).includes(match.id), isMobile: props.isMobile, onDragStart: props.onDragStart, onAssign: props.onAssign, onUnassign: props.onUnassign, onToggleSelected: props.onToggleSelected, selected: props.selectedMatchIds.includes(match.id) }

div.div: Drop an assigned card here to unassign it, or leave this empty once the day is fully planned.

div.p: Rows are timeslots, columns are courts, and each cell is a live assignment target.

DraggableMatchCard.t-props: { match: row.cells[court.id].match, draggable: !props.isMobile, assigned: true, highlighted: (props.highlightedMatchIds || []).includes(row.cells[court.id].match.id), isMobile: props.isMobile, onDragStart: props.onDragStart, onAssign: props.onAssignTap, onUnassign: props.onUnassign, onToggleSelected: props.onToggleSelected, selected: props.selectedMatchIds.includes(row.cells[court.id].match.id) }

div.div: Generate slots on a selected gameday to open the planner grid.

div.class: d-flex justify-content-between align-items-start gap-3 flex-wrap mb-3

div.p: Validate first, then publish a gameday or the full competition schedule.
div.div: Next action: Run validation, resolve blocking issues, and only force warning-only paths when a manager records an override reason.

ul.li: Warning-only publication requires manager override reason.
Republishing a live revision requires manager override reason.

div.div: Managers must record a reason before publishing with warnings or replacing a live schedule revision.

div.label: Manager override reason

textarea.t-att-placeholder: props.requiresReason ? 'Required when warnings are forced or a live schedule is replaced.' : 'Optional context for this publication.'

div.div: The reason is stored on the resulting schedule revision for operators and auditors.

div.class: d-flex justify-content-between align-items-start gap-3 flex-wrap mb-3

div.p: A season competition is the season-level container for divisions, schedules, and publication. Start from an existing template or create one inline for this season.

A federation manager must create the season competition first. After that, planners can open the workspace from the competition or a division and continue with divisions, teams, rounds, and slot planning.

div.class: d-flex justify-content-between align-items-start gap-3 flex-wrap mb-3

div.p: Use existing tournament records as divisions inside this competition.

div.div: Create the first division to start scheduling.

div.p: This creates the working tournament record used for team entries, rounds, gamedays, and matches.
Reuses existing tournament participant records rather than a duplicate team-entry model.

div.label: Search teams
div.div: Search runs server-side and excludes teams already entered in this division.
Use these controls to tune no-back-to-back pressure and short-rest streak limits without leaving the workspace.

div.class: card-body d-flex justify-content-between align-items-start gap-3 flex-wrap

div.div: No team entries yet. Add and confirm teams before you lock the participant list.

div.class: d-flex justify-content-between align-items-start gap-3 flex-wrap mb-3

div.label: Also include divisions

label.class: form-check form-check-inline card border-0 shadow-sm o_fed_cw_court_option

div.div: Selected divisions share one physical planner grid for this gameday.

div.class: d-flex justify-content-between align-items-start gap-3 flex-wrap mb-3

div.p: Select a gameday, pick courts, and generate the planning grid.

label.class: form-check form-check-inline card border-0 shadow-sm o_fed_cw_court_option

div.class: d-flex justify-content-between align-items-start gap-3 flex-wrap mb-3

div.p: Use this day-level surface after schedule structure and gamedays exist. Drag on desktop or tablet, or tap Assign on mobile to choose a slot explicitly.

CollaborationPanel.t-props: { collaboration: this.plannerCollaboration, title: 'Planner presence', emptyMessage: 'No other planners have checked in on this competition recently.' }

div.class: card-body d-flex justify-content-between align-items-start gap-3 flex-wrap

div.div: Bulk actions need either only unscheduled matches or only assigned matches.
No open slots are currently available on this gameday.

div.label: Manager override reason

textarea.placeholder: Required when forcing a warning-only planner action.

div.div: The reason is stored on the planner operation and attached to forced assignments.

UnscheduledMatchList.t-props: { matches: this.filteredUnscheduledMatches, highlightedMatchIds: this.plannerHighlightedMatchIds, isMobile: state.isMobile, onAssign: this.openMobileAssign.bind(this), onLoadMore: this.loadMoreUnscheduledMatches.bind(this), onUnassign: this.unassignMatch.bind(this), onDragStart: this.onDragStartMatch.bind(this), onToggleSelected: this.toggleMatchSelection.bind(this), selectedMatchIds: state.selectedMatchIds, hasMore: planner ? planner.unscheduled_has_more : false, loadedCount: planner ? planner.unscheduled_loaded_count : 0, loading: state.plannerLoading, totalCount: planner ? planner.unscheduled_total_count : 0 }

ScheduleGrid.t-props: { courts: planner ? planner.courts : [], gameday: planner ? planner.gameday : false, highlightedMatchIds: this.plannerHighlightedMatchIds, highlightedSlotIds: this.plannerHighlightedSlotIds, isMobile: state.isMobile, onAssignSelected: this.assignSelectedToSlot.bind(this), onAssignTap: this.openMobileAssign.bind(this), onDropMatch: this.handleDropMatch.bind(this), onDragStart: this.onDragStartMatch.bind(this), onUnassign: this.unassignMatch.bind(this), onToggleSelected: this.toggleMatchSelection.bind(this), rows: this.plannerRows, selectedMatchIds: state.selectedMatchIds, selectedUnscheduledCount: this.selectedUnscheduledMatches.length }

div.class: d-flex justify-content-between align-items-start gap-3 flex-wrap mb-3

div.p: Recent assignment, move, and unassignment actions stay visible so planners can review and reverse their last changes.

StatusBadge.t-props: { label: ((planner and planner.operation_history) ? planner.operation_history.length : 0) + ' recent', tone: 'info' }
{ label: (planner and planner.can_undo) ? 'undo ready' : 'no undo left', state: (planner and planner.can_undo) ? 'applied' : 'superseded' }

div.div: No planner actions have been recorded on this gameday yet.

MobileAssignmentDialog.t-props: { open: state.mobileAssign.open, gamedays: this.gamedayOptions, slots: this.mobileSlotOptions, values: state.mobileAssign, onClose: this.closeMobileAssign.bind(this), onConfirm: this.confirmMobileAssign.bind(this), onFieldChange: this.updateMobileAssignField.bind(this) }

CollaborationPanel.t-props: { collaboration: this.workspaceCollaboration, title: 'Workspace presence', emptyMessage: 'No other planners are active in this competition right now.' }

PublishScheduleDialog.t-props: { gamedays: selectedDivision.gamedays || [], overrideReason: state.overrideReason.publish, publishing: state.publishing, requiresReason: this.publishRequiresReason, validation: this.activeValidation, onReasonChange: this.updatePublishOverrideReason.bind(this), onValidate: this.validateSchedule.bind(this), onPublishGameday: this.publishGameday.bind(this), onPublishCompetition: this.publishCompetition.bind(this) }
